replies.msg:
Po主有話兒:
你搞唔成演唱會都出返個兩首由林夕填詞嘅新歌 - 《驚》同《夢》呀?　

News:
FWD富衛保險 陳奕迅 Fear and Dreams 香港演唱會 19/20
演出取消公告

《FWD富衛保險 陳奕迅 Fear and Dreams 香港演唱會 19/20》是Eason闊別紅館六年後的首個香港大型演唱會，經連月籌備綵排，台前幕後已一切準備就緒，要將最精彩的演出呈獻給期待已久的樂迷。

但鑒於近日情況，考慮到是次演唱會將於兩星期後舉行，我們實在無法預計和保證25場演出期間的觀衆安全和相關交通配套。經過與合作單位多番商議後，今天沉重宣布取消原定於紅磡香港體育館舉行的全部25場演唱會並將安排退票退款。

這決定對我們來說是極為艱難。除了時間、心血、努力和經濟的損失，我們同時承受近二十萬名觀眾和歌手的失望和失落。由於涉及觀眾人數龐大、申請演唱會場地和演職人員檔期配合等問題複雜，請恕我們無法就改期演出作出承諾。

原定於2019年11月25日起可提取經城市售票網公開發售門票的安排將會取消，已購票人士毋須前往提取門票。有關退票退款安排，我們與有關機構協商後，將於2019年12月18日於以下平台作出公佈，敬請留意：

1） ESL Ltd Facebook專頁 (www.facebook.com/ESLLtdOfficial)
2） 陳奕迅官方網站 (www.easonchan.net)
3） Universal Music Hong Kong Facebook 專頁（www.facebook.com/UniversalMusicHongKong）
4） UM Webzine Facebook 專頁 （www.facebook.com/umwebzine）
5） 城市售票網網頁（www.urbtix.hk）
6） 香港體育館網頁（www.lcsd.gov.hk/tc/hkc/index.html）

我們對是次取消深感歉意，請觀眾體諒。我們感激樂迷對Eason一直以來的支持。希望日後能夠再次成功申請紅館檔期，讓Eason在紅館為大家帶來更完美的演出。

主辦機構：ESL Ltd
2019年11月21日

稅局行動宣言：

稅局，納稅人金錢吐納之處。六月以降，香港警隊搬出大量催淚彈、布袋彈、橡膠子彈甚或實彈，一一射向香港市民。購置武器，所費不菲，警隊資金何來？稅款必是一大來源。港人金錢，變作供養濫暴警隊的薪水，變作不人道武器還於港人之身，這絕非稅款的正當用途。政府無能，特首執拗難以平息民憤，何解需公帑埋單？

香港市民安分守己，繳納血汗金錢；今民意所指為五大訴求，政府乃人民公僕，理應善用公帑以平眾怒，藉稅款促進訴求之達成以撫民心。然林鄭政府恣意調用港人金錢，屢行政治操作，維護腐敗議會，投稅款入朽壞警隊之血海，廣大市民如何甘心將夙夜辛勞所得，雙手奉上予這毫無公信力的政府？

我等市民將一連三星期到稅局抗議，以示港人之怒，不到五大訴求悉數落實一日不熄。

愈講愈九唔撚搭八

Eason used to give regular concerts in the 1990s which met with high international acclaim including oriental daily, southern daily, Hong Kong economic journal, south China morning post and various cultural websites. His song "Linda" has been greeted with widespread critical acclaim including Japan Today, Japan times online, Japan news amd various cultural websites. I saw his concerts in 2007 with my friends which was marvelous and unforgettable. The first time I saw his concert with my friends we were late. I remember I said "Look at the time. The concert will have begun." It was twenty after eight. The concert would be started by then. It was a worthwhile concert that was compelling to see again. He's been strutting his stuff since he was a kid so don't sell him short. At the end of the last encore he bowed onstage soaking up the applause. He received a standing ovation and thunderous applause. Eason and the dancers and acrobats who were invited to perform alongside him gave a superb performance. The choreography, the stage and lighting design and the glow sticks were magnificent and beyond all expectations. My cousin is planning on having Eason endorse his company's products but he'll have to make it financially worthwhile for him. My cousin is very career-oriented. Eason who's also very career-minded has a worthwhile job and career. I regard music performing as a worthwhile career. On top of being an incredible singer, Eason is an avid runner. He took part on a five hundred meter race where he came first. He rose to the occasion, ran for all he was worth and dived across the finish line, passing thr runners who were ahead of him earlier. His family and loads of his fans congratulated him on winning the race. The race was the opportunity for all the world's best male runners to strut their stuff. It was truly memorable. Yesterday I assigned five and a half hours for practising his songs on my saxophone, piccolo, flute, oboe, cor anglais (english horn), clarinet, E-flat clarinet, bass clarinet, bassoon and contrabassoon. I practised with my friends who played glockenspiel, xylophone, vibraphone, marimba, chimes, timpani (kettle drum) and celesta, all of which have definite pitch. Adding these instruments makes the music more rhythmic. Saxophone, cor anglais and clarinet are transposing instruments. Sax, clarinet and bass clarinet are single reed instruments. Oboe, cor anglais, bassoon and contrabassoon are double reed instruments. Flute is a reedless instrument. After the concert we dined in a nearby ramen restaurant. I remember the table was sticky maybe because the staff forgot to wipe it up so I asked them to wipe it up. Later I spilled a bowl of miso soup all over the table and the floor so I had to wipe the spilt soup up. We had a friendly chat with a lady sitting at a nearby table who told us once upon a time, a whole village was wiped out by a Super gigantic earthquake which was fascinating to hear. When I finished my bowl of ramen I wioed my mouth on my sleeves lol amd a few tissues. There's an elegant cafe nearby of which the interior and the exterior are artistically and exquisitely designed. My friend John spilt his cappuccino all over his work and down his tie the other day so he had to wipe up this mess. I enjoy drinking coffee and chatting with the baristas there so much that I sometimes make it worth their while.

Lady Gaga獲世界衞生組織邀請，聯同Global Citizen組織全球慈善音樂會《同一個世界：共同在家》(One World: Together at Home)，將於香港時間4月19日凌晨2時透過網絡，在全球免費播出，另早上8時於美國電視台直播，以表達對於醫護工作者的鼓勵，支持在前線奮鬥的醫生、護士及世界各地家庭。

此次由美國名嘴Jimmy Fallon、Jimmy Kimmel及Stephen Colbert主持，表演嘉賓包括張學友、陳奕迅（Eason）、郎朗、艾頓莊（Elton John）、Taylor Swift、Billie Eilish、Celine Dion、「籮霸」珍妮花洛庇絲（Jennifer Lopez）、Sam Smith等等。節目主要告知觀眾明白武漢肺炎的風險、預防及應對措施，由來自音樂、藝術、體育、喜劇界的明星擔任嘉賓，並將採訪世界衞生組織的專家以及前線的醫護人員，曾確診武漢肺炎並已康復的英國男星Idris Elba及太太也會現身說法。

據知，今次是大會發信給香港環球唱片，點名邀請學友和Eason參與，各唱兩首歌曲，為響應Together at Home主題，在家中預錄好演唱片段交給大會播出。張學友對於獲邀參與這次活動，他表示：「只是做自己該做的事，希望可以幫上一點忙，疫情盡快過去。」他希望在這個艱困時刻，為全球人民一起加油打氣。

此外，Lady Gaga亦親自游說世界各大企業高層以及知名慈善家，於一星期內為前線醫護人員籌得3,500萬美元。
